scripts.test: npm run check:browser && npm run test:browser

holds.jquery: jQuery 4 is outside Bootstrap 4.6.2's supported peer range, so the public theme remains on jQuery 3.7.1.
holds.publicBootstrap: The compiled public theme and inherited views use Bootstrap 4 data APIs and utility classes, so the safest stable line is Bootstrap 4.6.2 until a full theme migration is owned.
holds.publicPopper: Bootstrap 4.6.2 requires the discontinued Popper 1 package line. popper.js 1.16.1 is pinned for audit coverage, while the production bootstrap.bundle asset embeds the compatible runtime.
holds.dashboardBundle: AdminKit 3.4.0 is the newest stable shell, but it still embeds Bootstrap 5.3.0 and Chart.js 2.9.4 and installs deprecated Babel polyfill and Core-JS 2 transitives. Shared chart configuration detects that bundled major, while stats pages replace the global once with standalone Chart.js 4.5.1 after the shell loads.
holds.fontawesomeIconpicker: Font Awesome Icon Picker 3.2.0 is discontinued. It remains pinned at its final stable release because active theme-admin call sites depend on its jQuery API.
holds.fontselectPackageLayout: fontselect-jquery-plugin 1.1.0 is pinned for inventory and audit coverage, but its non-searchable anchor-based UI is incompatible with the active searchable span-based font selector and existing CSS. The shipped compatible asset remains held until its UI can be migrated and tested.

compatibilityHolds.admin-shell:@adminkit/core: AdminKit 3.4.0 is the latest compatible prebuilt dashboard shell and cannot be partially upgraded safely.
compatibilityHolds.admin-shell:bootstrap: Bootstrap 5.3.0 is embedded in the pinned AdminKit shell and will move only with a tested shell replacement.
compatibilityHolds.admin-shell:chart.js: Chart.js 2.9.4 is embedded in AdminKit and is isolated behind the tested dual-major compatibility adapter.
compatibilityHolds.admin-shell:core-js: The AdminKit artifact owns its embedded polyfill runtime, so replacement requires rebuilding or replacing the complete shell.
compatibilityHolds.admin-shell:feather-icons: The embedded icon runtime belongs to AdminKit and remains isolated from the separately managed browser package.
compatibilityHolds.admin-shell:jsvectormap: The embedded map runtime belongs to AdminKit and remains isolated from the separately managed browser package.
compatibilityHolds.browser:bootstrap: The public themes still use Bootstrap 4 data APIs and require a dedicated Bootstrap 5 migration with visual regression coverage.
compatibilityHolds.browser:fontawesome-iconpicker: The discontinued final release remains temporarily required by active theme editor call sites pending a tested replacement.
compatibilityHolds.browser:fontselect-jquery-plugin: The registry package has an incompatible DOM contract and cannot replace the active searchable selector without UI migration.
compatibilityHolds.browser:jquery: Bootstrap 4.6.2 supports jQuery 3 and is incompatible with the current jQuery 4 stable line.
compatibilityHolds.browser:popper.js: Bootstrap 4.6.2 requires Popper 1, while production uses the matching runtime embedded in bootstrap.bundle.
compatibilityHolds.composer:phpunit/phpunit: PHPUnit 13 requires PHP 8.4.1 and cannot satisfy the project PHP 8.3 minimum runtime.
